title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 22 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 22 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 22 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 22/05/2025
Today, the DCE iron ore futures market fluctuated rangebound, with the most-traded contract I2509eventually closing at 727, up 0.14% for the day. Traders showed moderate enthusiasm for selling, with some offering goods at lower prices; steel mills purchased as needed. The market transaction sentiment was moderate.
